description:
Deep antagonistic quality review of `hx-tooltip` (T1-22). 6/6 libraries — deceptively complex a11y.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-tooltip/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, placement typing (top/bottom/left/right + auto), delay timing typed, trigger element typing
2. Accessibility — tooltip MUST appear on both hover AND focus (keyboard users), `role="tooltip"`, trigger element has `aria-describedby` pointing to tooltip content, tooltip does NOT disappear when cursor moves over it, Escape closes it, not used for essential information, `prefers-reduced-motion` disables animation, axe-core pass
3. Tests — hover shows/hides, focus shows/hides, Escape closes, delay respected, placement collision detection
4. Storybook — all placements, hover/focus demos, delay demo, rich content
5. CSS — Floating UI or native positioning, `--hx-*` tokens, arrow pointer, CSS parts
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB (Floating UI adds weight — check)
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable trigger, tooltip content via slot or attribute

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-tooltip/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-tooltip — T1-22 antagonistic quality review
